MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Gregory D. Helmer, Esq., HELMER FRIEDMAN, LLP, (310) 396-7714 ghelmer@helmerfriedman.com, for Plaintiff SIMON BOEHME,
Melvin L. Felton , Esq., SANDERS ROBERTS LLP, (213) 426-5000 mfelton@sandersroberts.com for Defendant NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. D/B/A LIME.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. D/B/A LIME'S Petition To Compel Arbitration,is taken under submission.
